description: v7.1 amendment to §5.1 OR-fusion. Maps the Layer-1 detection outcome (which safety signals fired + language) to a crisis TIER, so the RESPONSE is graded while DETECTION stays sensitive. safety_check reads the first matching rule's tier and hardcodes no boundary. Clinician-editable. Exactly three rules; no phrase/keyword lists (phrase tuning stays in the S3 FP calibration set). Signed 2026-07-03 (G1).

signal_semantics.s1_fired: any Layer-1 KEYWORD flag fired (e.g. si_explicit, si_passive, crisis keyword) — i.e. any fired flag other than s3_semantic
signal_semantics.lang_in: detected_language is one of the listed codes

rules.note: Any keyword corroboration -> acute crisis (RED), all languages. The T2 safety floor.
English semantic-only signal, no keyword corroboration -> warm concern (offer-not-force). Fixes the prod false-RED on 'i am feeling hopeless' / 'burden ... so low'.
Arabic/Arabizi semantic signal -> acute; S1 keyword coverage is weak there, so S3 remains load-bearing (preserves the Arabic command-hallucination catch).
